Footer.tagline: The operating system for modern dealerships: inventory, customers, sales, workshop, and invoicing in one connected platform.

LandingMeta.title: AutoSaaS | The Dealer Management System Built to Become Your ERP.
LandingMeta.description: AutoSaaS unifies vehicle inventory, customer CRM, sales, workshop, and finance for dealerships. Cloud-based, GDPR-compliant, hosted in Germany.

LandingPage.description: AutoSaaS unifies inventory, customers, sales, and workshop management in one platform. Built to replace fragmented tools — and designed to grow into your dealership's complete ERP.
LandingPage.featureTitle: Everything your dealership runs on — one platform.
LandingPage.featureIntro: From vehicle intake to final invoice, AutoSaaS covers every operation without the tool-switching and data loss that slows your team down.
LandingPage.helpText: Talk to our team. We'll set you up.
LandingPage.finalTitle: Start free. Scale to your full dealership group.
LandingPage.finalDescription: Begin with core DMS features at no cost. Upgrade as your operations grow — AutoSaaS is architected to become your complete dealership ERP.

trust.privacy: No data shared with third parties

items.title: Vehicle Inventory
bullets: Full stock view with VIN, status, mileage, and pricing in one place.
Instant sync across listings, sales records, and workshop history.
Import vehicles from any source and manage them centrally.

items.title: Customer & CRM
bullets: Unified customer records with full purchase history and service logs.
Track every interaction across sales, workshop, and follow-up.
Automated reminders keep your pipeline and retention moving.

items.title: Sales & Contracting
bullets: Generate legally reviewed contracts directly from deal data.
Digital signing and document workflows built into the flow.
Close faster with fewer manual steps and zero lost paperwork.

items.title: Workshop & Service
bullets: Create work orders from vehicle records in one click.
Assign jobs to technicians and track real-time progress.
Parts, labor time, and invoicing fully integrated.

items.title: Finance & Compliance
bullets: GDPR-ready, with XRechnung and ZUGFeRD included.
Store documents in legally required archival formats.
Audit trails, KPI dashboards, and reporting at any time.

items.title: AI & Automation
bullets: Capture vehicle records by voice — AI formats and files them.
Auto-publish listings to all major automotive marketplaces.
Workflows that learn from your data and improve continuously.

form.hint: Secure access with your AutoSaaS account.

RegisterPage.title: Start free. Get your dealership running in minutes.

trust.access: No data shared with third parties

RegisterPage.formDescription: Use your business email and choose a secure password.

form.hint: By creating an account, you agree to our terms and privacy policy.
